title: Bakers-Tools Polymer
description: A Polymer and filament based Datapack that adds copper, amethyst and soon emerald tools.
body:
This is a datapack that is to be loaded by Filament, a Polymer mod that allows creating custom blocks items and more with datapacks. 

# Features

## Copper tools
 These can mine faster than iron and have the durability of iron but can only mine at a level that stone can.

## Amethyst tools
These can mine at the speed of diamond have the same durability and can mine the same materials, but cannot be upgraded to netherite.

## Emerald tools
These have the durability of Diamond can mine the materials of netherite and are as fast as netherite.
